Thank you, Viveka, and, uh, welcome to this, uh, quarterly, uh, result presentation. So, if we start on the first page, uh, I think we, despite all the challenges that we had during the past year, we did in fact see, uh, gradual improvement of the global economy, uh, during the year. Uh, on the listed companies a number of the companies have made important strategic, uh, uh, acquisitions and investments during the year, uh, within Patricia.
